experience

Xilinx Labs Asia Pacific, Singapore

Mentor: Dr. Haris Javaid and Dr. Chengchen Hu

Worked on the design and implementation of an endorsement policy evaluator which was part of a hardware-software co-designed platform for the Hyperledger Fabric blockchain distributed system on Xilinx Alveo FPGA accelerators. The work has been published as ICDCS 2022

AMD India Pvt. Ltd., Bangalore

Mentor: Dr. Prasenjit Basu and Dr. Anasua Bhowmik

Worked on analysis of vector instruction set architectures on HPC workloads using internal simulators and benchmarking state-of-the-art hardware

Nanyang Technological University, Singapore

Mentor: Dr. Alok Prakash and Prof. T. Srikanthan

Worked on the mapping of the KLT Object Tracking Algorithm on Heterogeneous Platforms on the Odroid XU-4 board, for a CPU-GPU based execution model using OpenCL to improve the application runtime by orders of magnitude
